ios.shortDescription: Learn essential cybersecurity skills through interactive modules, quizzes, and CTF challenges.
ios.description:
CyberSafe Student Portal is your comprehensive cybersecurity education companion. Learn anywhere, anytime — even offline.

🔐 LEARN CYBERSECURITY
• Interactive modules covering password security, phishing detection, social media safety, and more
• Video lessons with expert-curated content
• Hands-on exercises and real-world scenarios

🏆 GAMIFIED EXPERIENCE
• Earn badges and achievements as you progress
• Compete on leaderboards with fellow students
• Complete daily challenges and maintain your learning streak

🚩 CAPTURE THE FLAG (CTF)
• Practice offensive and defensive security skills
• Join teams and compete in live CTF competitions
• Solve challenges across web, crypto, forensics, and more

📱 MOBILE-FIRST FEATURES
• Download modules for offline learning
• Push notifications for streak reminders
• QR code scanner for team joining and certificate verification
• Biometric login with Face ID and Touch ID

👥 COMMUNITY
• Join study groups and discussion forums
• Connect with mentors and fellow learners
• Share achievements and certificates

📜 EARN CERTIFICATES
• Verifiable certificates upon course completion
• Share credentials on LinkedIn and social media
• QR-code verification for authenticity

CyberSafe is trusted by students and universities worldwide. Start your cybersecurity journey today!

android.shortDescription: Learn cybersecurity skills with interactive modules, CTF challenges & offline support
android.fullDescription:
CyberSafe Student Portal is your comprehensive cybersecurity education companion. Learn anywhere, anytime — even offline.

🔐 LEARN CYBERSECURITY
• Interactive modules covering password security, phishing detection, social media safety, and more
• Video lessons with expert-curated content
• Hands-on exercises and real-world scenarios

🏆 GAMIFIED EXPERIENCE
• Earn badges and achievements as you progress
• Compete on leaderboards with fellow students
• Complete daily challenges and maintain your learning streak

🚩 CAPTURE THE FLAG (CTF)
• Practice offensive and defensive security skills
• Join teams and compete in live CTF competitions
• Solve challenges across web, crypto, forensics, and more

📱 MOBILE-FIRST FEATURES
• Download modules for offline learning
• Push notifications for streak reminders
• QR code scanner for team joining and certificate verification
• Biometric login with fingerprint

👥 COMMUNITY
• Join study groups and discussion forums

📜 EARN CERTIFICATES

CyberSafe is trusted by students and universities worldwide. Start your cybersecurity journey today!

preSubmission: All critical bugs fixed and verified
Performance testing passed (60fps scrolling, <2s cold start)
Push notifications tested on physical devices
Deep links tested (cybersafe:// and universal links)
Biometric login tested on Face ID and Touch ID devices
All required app icon sizes generated
Screenshots captured for all required device sizes
iosSpecific: Export compliance questions answered (uses HTTPS = Yes)
Associated domains for universal links configured in Xcode
Production build signed with distribution certificate
androidSpecific: App Links verified with Digital Asset Links
Target API level meets Play Store requirements
postLaunch: Monitor crash reports for first 48 hours
In-app banner for existing web users to download mobile app
